summary:
Full e2e validation of the 6 EasyLeaz+EasyLoc modifications. All backend API tests (8/8) pass; all frontend UI/integration checks pass. Vehicle descriptions present in both catalogues; toggle works (text label switches Voir → Masquer, animated

rendered). Catalogue CTA navigates to /?vehicle=...#demande and auto-opens leasing form pre-filled with vehicle name. All 6 new form fields present (children_count, children_ages conditional, address, housing_status, employment_date type=month, monthly_income); 'Revenus annuels' label fully removed. Lead created via multipart POST persists every new field; admin modal displays them; CSV export contains all 6 required headers + correct values. EasyLoc unavailable-dates endpoint returns approved-reservation dates and the modal DayPicker disables them (32 disabled cells observed). EasyLoc native date-picker indicator has gold CSS filter (invert(73%) sepia(70%)…) applied via .easyloc-scope scoping. Admin VehicleManager 'Photos' button present and triggers a multiple file input.

issues: Labels diverge slightly from CSV headers: modal shows 'STATUT LOGEMENT' (CSV says 'Situation logement') and 'ENFANTS' (CSV says 'Nombre d enfants'). Data is correct; only the visible label wording differs. Non-blocking but inconsistent terminology.

action_items: OPTIONAL/Polish: Align admin LeadsManager modal labels with CSV headers — change 'STATUT LOGEMENT' → 'Situation logement' and 'ENFANTS' → 'Nombre d enfants' for consistency (cosmetic only, no functional impact).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1093 lines — consider splitting into routers (leads, easyloc, vehicles, admin) for maintainability.
EL reservation approval is PUT /api/easyloc/admin/reservations/{id} while leads use PATCH /api/leads/{id}; inconsistent verb across admin endpoints.
No DELETE endpoint for easyloc reservations from the public side (only admin) — fine but test cleanup must use admin route.
Frontend uses Radix Select (shadcn) for children_count — fine for users but not selectable via Playwright's select_option (requires .click + option role). Documenting for next testing agent.
seed_data_creation: Test created 1 lead (TEST_<uuid>) and 1 approved EasyLoc reservation (60-62 days out). Lead deleted on cleanup. Reservation DELETE endpoint may not exist on admin route — 3 unavailable dates may still be blocked for vehicle A35 around date.today()+60 days. Recommend manual purge if it interferes with future tests: db.easyloc_reservations.deleteMany({nom: 'TEST_Iter9'}).
context_for_next_testing_agent:
Backend test file /app/backend/tests/test_iter9_full.py validates the 6 modifications end-to-end and can be re-run as regression. For frontend, the shadcn Select component (children_count) requires .click() + role=option click instead of select_option(). The catalogue description content does NOT have a dedicated data-testid — verify via the button label toggle 'Voir la description' ↔ 'Masquer la description' and

presence. EasyLoc modal calendar uses react-day-picker; disabled days are marked with aria-disabled='true'.
rca of the issue: No critical issue found. All 6 modifications work end-to-end. Initial test failures in my pytest were due to using wrong response field ('name' vs 'brand'+'model') and wrong reservation approval route (PATCH vs PUT /admin/reservations) — fixed in test code, not in app.
